UTILS_I2C_DESCRIPTION: Utility blocks for I2C peripherals, such as scanning for devices on the bus.
UTILS_I2C_SCAN_TOOLTIP: Scan the I2C bus for connected devices and return an array of their addresses
UTILS_I2C_SCAN_PRINT_MESSAGE0: print scan of I2C bus of $[I2C_INSTANCE]
UTILS_I2C_SCAN_PRINT_TOOLTIP: Scan the I2C bus and print the addresses of connected devices to the console
